text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
…That sums it up quite nicely. 
What do you think, Rice?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Umm… I must say it sounds… quite nice.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: U-Um, Rice… What did you… just say?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um… I am simply trying to… emulate you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
D-Do I really speak in such a manner? 
Surely you must be exaggerating.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
No. You always speak so politely… like a 
princess in a picture book.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
…Well. When you say that with such sparkling 
eyes, how can I tell you to stop…
